div1.entryFree: Tediously, so as to weary; longer or more slowly than is desired: the cripple tardy-gaited night who, like a foul and ugly witch, doth limp so t. away, H5 IV Chor. H5 IV Chor. night hath been too brief. Beshrew the witch! with venomous wights she stays as t. as hell, Troil. IV, 2, 13 (Ff hideously).
